allow: PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":8080 "\) | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique; $pids | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Port 8080 cleared")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="postgre"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d innovify_db -c "SELECT id_usuario, nombre_completo, correo_institucional, rol, verificado FROM usuarios ORDER BY id_usuario;" 2>&1)
